articles.title: Hot Mic Captures Awkward F-Bomb Clash at Trump’s Summit
articles.description: Kenny Holston/Poo/Reuters A sweary skirmish broke out during the summit between the U.S. and China. Leaders from Washington and Beijing were filing into the Great Hall of the People , China’s national legislature building, where top officials from both sides were meeting for bilateral talks. As they took their seats, a press pool camera broadcasting on PBS News kept its tape rolling whilst its operator appeared to be lambasted by an unnamed person with an American accent. Read more at The Daily Beast.

articles.title: Chicago Knight Rider car framed for speeding in New York City
articles.description: A Kitt lookalike was filmed speeding in Brooklyn but the fine was sent to a museum where a replica is on display A replica of the talking car Kitt from the 1980s US television action series Knight Rider for years has been parked in a museum about an hour’s drive north of Chicago , so how did it get a speeding ticket in New York City ? That is the question the Volo Museum is asking after it says it was recently mailed a $50 fine by New York City for a violation caught by traffic camera, alleging that its Knight Industries Two Thousand – Kitt for short and a black Pontiac Trans Am– got busted going 9mph over the speed limit in a 25mph zone on 22 April. Continue reading...

articles.title: PSPG, OSAA, Marines to undergo paraffin test after Senate gunfire — PNP
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — Police Security and Protection Group (PSPG) and Philippine Marine Corp officers who were deployed to the Senate, as well as personnel of the Office of the Senate Sergeant-at-Arms (OSAA), will undergo paraffin tests after an incident in which gunshots were heard at the chamber, according to the Philippine National Police (PNP). The PNP, the Armed Forces of the Philippines and the National Bureau of Investigation have all denied that their personnel had fired shots at the Senate on Wednesday night amid tensions over the looming arrest of Sen. Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa. In a press briefing at [...]... Keep on reading: PSPG, OSAA, Marines to undergo paraffin test after Senate gunfire — PNP

articles.title: Garafil: Articles of Impeachment delivered to Senate despite shootings
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Articles of Impeachment against Vice President Sara Duterte have been properly transmitted to the Senate despite a commotion on its premises. This action was announced by House Secretary General Cheloy Garafil. Garafil, in a statement on Thursday, said that the House Secretariat, which delivered the Articles of Impeachment to the Senate, was only focused on “fulfilling its constitutional duty faithfully.” “The transmittal of the Articles of Impeachment to the Senate last night was completed successfully and in an orderly manner despite the many developments unfolding simultaneously,” she said. “Throughout the process, the House of Representatives remained focused [...]... Keep on reading: Garafil: Articles of Impeachment delivered to Senate despite shootings
